title: lippia baumii
intro: Lippia baumii is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae, commonly known as the 'Tamboti' or 'Wild Rosemary'. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lippia baumii include treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Lippia baumii is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
